titular: Dyson Introduces First Portable Fan, the HushJet Mini Cool
cuerpo: [{"text": "Dyson has launched a new product called the HushJet Mini Cool, which uses Dyson's proprietary air projection technology known as HushJet. This technology was previously used in an air purifier that was credited to be one of the quietest on the market.", "type": "paragraph"}, {"text": "Dyson claims that the fan can deliver directed airflow up to 25 m/s, equivalent to 55 mph. The motor without a coil spins at 65,000 RPM.", "type": "paragraph"}, {"text": "The company has also promised that the fan has a power of up to 12 Joules and uses the PTM (Pulse Technology Motor) system, making it more efficient compared to other models on the market.", "type": "paragraph"}]
resumen_seo: Dyson ha lanzado su ventilador portátil más silencioso del mercado, el HushJet Mini Cool, que utiliza la tecnología HushJet de proyección aérea propietaria y un motor sin bobina que alcanza hasta 65.000 RPM.
